name: Classify Links
description: Classify a list of URLs into platform buckets (maps/reviews, food delivery, hotel booking, marketplaces, social, app stores, SaaS review sites, etc.). Use after scraping or web-search to decide which platform-specific skills to run next.

urls.description: URLs separated by newlines or commas. If empty, the skill will try to extract URLs from the user message.

taxonomyJson.description: Optional JSON string produced by platform-taxonomy. When provided, classification uses taxonomy.domainRules for unlimited ecosystems.
